steps.t: Aggy Digweed, Guardsman Otley, Giles Chadwick, and Nellie Boskins can all be found in Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aggy Digweed, Guardsman Otley,…
Aran Greenwith can be found in Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
Marl's Crossing, Norwarden, Old Bluff-house, Overwine Hall, and Sutwarden can all be found in the Wildwood. You should scout the Wildwood for the Wood…
Aran Greenwith can be found in Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
